title: Windows Credential Dumping via Procdump
description: Detects credential dumping attempts targeting the LSASS process using procdump or similar tools.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'procdump.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*lsass*') or ('Command Line' like '*lsass.dmp*'))
